'''mochashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:huge|huge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huge|huge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mochashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochashithi|mochashithi]] || [[word:mochashiji|mochashiji]] || [[word:mochashishi|mochashishi]] || [[word:mochashiki|mochashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochashuthuthu|mochashuthuthu]] || [[word:mochashujuju|mochashujuju]] || [[word:mochashushushu|mochashushushu]] || [[word:mochashukuku|mochashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochashuthu|mochashuthu]] || [[word:mochashuju|mochashuju]] || [[word:mochashushu|mochashushu]] || [[word:mochashuku|mochashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochashufthuf|mochashufthuf]] || [[word:mochashufjuf|mochashufjuf]] || [[word:mochashufshuf|mochashufshuf]] || [[word:mochashufkuf|mochashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochashethe|mochashethe]] || [[word:mochasheje|mochasheje]] || [[word:mochasheshe|mochasheshe]] || [[word:mochasheke|mochasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochashothotho|mochashothotho]] || [[word:mochashojojo|mochashojojo]] || [[word:mochashoshosho|mochashoshosho]] || [[word:mochashokoko|mochashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochashotho|mochashotho]] || [[word:mochashojo|mochashojo]] || [[word:mochashosho|mochashosho]] || [[word:mochashoko|mochashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochashofthof|mochashofthof]] || [[word:mochashofjof|mochashofjof]] || [[word:mochashofshof|mochashofshof]] || [[word:mochashofkof|mochashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfthĂŻf|mochashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfjĂŻf|mochashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfshĂŻf|mochashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfkĂŻf|mochashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mochashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mochashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mochashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mochashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfthĂŻf|mochashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfjĂŻf|mochashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfshĂŻf|mochashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfkĂŻf|mochashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfthĂŻf|mochashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfjĂŻf|mochashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfshĂŻf|mochashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mochashĂŻfkĂŻf|mochashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mochashĂŠthĂŠ|mochashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mochashĂŠjĂŠ|mochashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mochashĂŠshĂŠ|mochashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mochashĂŠkĂŠ|mochashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mochashathatha|mochashathatha]] || [[word:mochashajaja|mochashajaja]] || [[word:mochashashasha|mochashashasha]] || [[word:mochashakaka|mochashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mochashatha|mochashatha]] || [[word:mochashaja|mochashaja]] || [[word:mochashasha|mochashasha]] || [[word:mochashaka|mochashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mochashafthaf|mochashafthaf]] || [[word:mochashafjaf|mochashafjaf]] || [[word:mochashafshaf|mochashafshaf]] || [[word:mochashafkaf|mochashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mochashasha|mochashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochashshĂ«asha|mochashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochashroasha|mochashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochashmuasha|mochashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochashyaasha|mochashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochashnkshĂ«asha|gomochashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochashnkroasha|gomochashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochashnkmuasha|gomochashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochashnkyaasha|gomochashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mochachashasha|mochachashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochachashshĂ«asha|mochachashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochachashroasha|mochachashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochachashmuasha|mochachashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochachashyaasha|mochachashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochachashnkshĂ«asha|gomochachashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochachashnkroasha|gomochachashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochachashnkmuasha|gomochachashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochachashnkyaasha|gomochachashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mechĂŠshasha|mechĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mechĂŠshshĂ«asha|mechĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mechĂŠshroasha|mechĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mechĂŠshmuasha|mechĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mechĂŠshyaasha|mechĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomechĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|gomechĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomechĂŠshnkroasha|gomechĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomechĂŠshnkmuasha|gomechĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomechĂŠshnkyaasha|gomechĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mochfashasha|mochfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mochfashshĂ«asha|mochfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mochfashroasha|mochfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mochfashmuasha|mochfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mochfashyaasha|mochfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomochfashnkshĂ«asha|gomochfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomochfashnkroasha|gomochfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomochfashnkmuasha|gomochfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomochfashnkyaasha|gomochfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
